who: restaurant owners managing payroll for 5–15 employees
offer: For restaurant owners managing payroll for 5–15 employees, inefficient manual processes cause payroll errors and delays. We automate timesheet collection and tip calculations instead of manual payroll processing using spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient manual payroll processes leading to errors and delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant payroll help
Indie Hackers discussions on payroll workflows
DM outreach to restaurant owners with demo video
Community forums for sharing payroll tools
try_it: Let users try regulatory reporting generation and invoice entry form
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
